name: pi-doc-review
description_en: Native Markdown document review window for AI coding agents (pi, Claude Code, Codex CLI). Opens a Glimpse window that renders Markdown, lets the user leave selection and document comments, edit the raw Markdown, and returns feedback to the agent.
description_zh: AI 编码代理（pi、Claude Code、Codex CLI）的原生 Markdown 文档审查窗口。打开一个渲染 Markdown 的 Glimpse 窗口，允许用户进行选择和文档评论，编辑原始 Markdown，并将反馈返回给代理
